race.comment: BONNY ROCK (2) got the job done over 1300m at Kalgoorlie last time out, winning by 0.5L. She's a track and trip winner in the past and she rates highly on the back of her last start win. Webster's claim comes in handy and with a handy setup here, she can go back-to-back. SUPERB VINTAGE (10) dipped a little second-up, but she'll find this a much easier event third-up into the campaign. She'll need a touch of luck from the barrier, though Watson knows him well and she still has a bit of upside. Can bounce back in a big way this time around. LOOKS (5) is racing in good order without winning, leading last start and finishing 1.5L off the winner. This is much easier and although he rises in weight, he'll be hard to reel in on his recent form. SILENT AMARDA (3) is ticking along nicely and won't be far away. MISS FINKMEYER (6) is third-up now and with a couple of gear changes, she can improve.
